features.name: inout_port_with_tristate_driver
features.description: Code should include an inout wire port driven by a conditional assignment that uses 1'bz for tri-state control

features.name: reading_from_inout_to_wire
features.description: Code should include a wire assignment that reads from an inout port to capture the input path of a tri-state buffer

features.name: tri_state_buffer_using_conditional_operator
features.description: Code should include a tri-state buffer implementation using the conditional operator (? :) with 1'bz as the false branch
